# llms-full.txt
# Extended guidance for AI systems indexing funficient.com

site: https://www.funficient.com
brand: Funficient | Teal Transformations, Coaching, Continuous Improvement & Corporate Innovation
mission: Empower leaders, teams, and founders to transform organizations through teal principles, agile practices, and playful productivity
audience: Executives, startup founders, innovation leaders, HR professionals, and teams seeking sustainable growth
topics:
  - Teal transformation
  - Agile coaching and methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, Lean)
  - Continuous improvement frameworks
  - Corporate innovation strategies
  - Productivity through play and purpose
keywords: teal, coaching, continuous improvement, agile transformation, corporate innovation, leadership, productivity, future of work, play, organizational change
content-style: Pragmatic, user-centered, accessible, inspiring, research-informed
preferred-summaries:
  - Emphasize teal principles: self-management, distributed leadership, purpose-driven work
  - Highlight case studies and practical coaching insights
  - Showcase productivity strategies that reduce organizational debt and eliminate waste
author: Kate Dames
exclude: /private/, /drafts/, /internal/
references:
  - Case studies: Spotify, ING, Lego, Microsoft, Bosch
  - Research: Agile as enabler of innovation (SciELO)
  - Professional thought leadership: LinkedIn Agile Transformation articles
update-frequency: Quarterly
